title: alisma gramineum f. aestuosum
intro: Alisma gramineum f. aestuosum, also known as the Asian water plantain or yellow water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the alisma genus and is widely distributed in East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alisma gramineum f. aestuosum include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, edema, and hypertension, as well as its potential to reduce blood sugar levels and improve kidney function. Herbal preparations of Alisma gramineum f. aestuosum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by infusing the roots or rhizomes of the plant in hot water.
